From: "Evelyn Carter" To: "Adrian Sinclair" Subject: Local services & upcoming events for Newport residents — March update Date: Thu, 23 Oct 2087 17:12:33 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Newport Community Services — March Update

Newport Community Services

Dear Adrian,

We hope you are keeping well. This is our monthly update highlighting local services and upcoming events in Newport that may be of interest to residents who are retired.

Featured activities & services

  • Weekly Coffee Morning — Join neighbours for conversation and light refreshments every Tuesday at the Riverside Community Centre. Details and sign-up: newport.gov.uk/community-activities
  • Digital Skills for Seniors — Free one-hour sessions to help with email, online shopping, and video calls. Reserve a spot on Eventbrite: eventbrite.co.uk
  • Free NHS Health Check — Eligible residents can book a routine health check through the NHS: nhs.uk

How we can help

If you need assistance with transport to events, help accessing online services, or information about local benefits, our team is here to support you. Quick links:

Visit Newport Council   Benefits & Entitlements

Need to contact us?

Reply to this email or call our community helpline on 029 20 123 456 (available Monday–Friday, 9am–4pm). You can also find more resources at newport.gov.uk.

If you'd like us to tailor future updates to your interests, please reply with the topics you'd prefer (events, health, transport, volunteering).

Warm regards,
Evelyn Carter
Community Services Coordinator

Newport Community Services • 12 Civic Centre, Newport • services@newportcommunity.org
